productDisplayName: Puma Men's Basket II Clean Black White Shoe
description: The Basket II Clean shoes from puma are a fresh take on the Basket Classics from the puma archives. First launched in 1971, this all-time classic retro-style will never be out of date. The leather upper provides comfort and durability while the rubber outsole offers absolute grip.Upper Leather upper for great style with synthetic formstripe Central lacing system for snug, customised Fit Upper stitched to the outsole for added durability Lightly padded collar for snug fit Perforations on the medial side for breathability Synthetic overlay on the heel cup for maximum shock absorption Midsole Lightly padded insole for added comfort. EVA midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Textured rubber outsole for durability and traction
